description: Write a Go function to check for a first run of a command line tool. It should check if a config json file exists in the Magshare folder inside the user config directory. If it does not exist, trigger an interactive terminal prompt to ask the user two questions. First, ask where they want received files to be saved, defaulting to a Magshare Downloads folder in their home directory. Second, ask if they want to enable PIN security by default. Save their answers to the config file and automatically create the downloads folder so it is ready for future transfers.
